meaning: n.[解]虹膜,鸢尾属植物,[希神]彩虹之女神,虹,虹彩
examples: Iris scanning can work from a distance.
The Global Impact Investment Network's IRIS project seeks to do just that.
What attracted me the most towards the Performance Team was their enthusiasm and pride in their work at Iris.
Iris-scanning cameras make sure you're the real, living thing by checking the pulse inside your eyeball.
Middle Eastern and European countries use iris scans to recognize travelers at airports and border crossings.
